        x2 = tl.load(g1_x2_ptrs, mask=m_mask[:, None], other=0.0)

        # SwiGLU with numerically stable sigmoid to avoid overflow
        silu_x2 = x2 * tl.sigmoid(x2)
        c = silu_x2 * x1 

        # Dynamic FP8 Quantization per block
        c_max = tl.max(tl.abs(c), axis=1)
        c_scale = tl.maximum(c_max / 448.0, 1e-12)
        c_fp8 = (c / c_scale[:, None]).to(tl.float8_e4m3fn)
